'''Zel''' was one of the leaders of the [[Freedom resistance movement|Freedom movement]], serving [[Malinza Thanas]] during the height of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. When Malinza escaped from [[Prison/Legends|jail]], with the help of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], it was Zel's hot temper that led him to accuse Jaina of betraying them. It was only when a [[Homing beacon/Legends|homing beacon]] was found sewn into the waistband of Malinza's pants did Zel relent. Zel was killed by [[Bakuran]] police when the location of [[the Stack]] was revealed. The police raided the Stack, and Zel was shot while trying to flee.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
